DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_PERMIT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_PERMIT]
( 
	[JobPermitID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobPermitTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobPermitStatusID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PermitAuthorityID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AssignedToID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[PermitNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PermitDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CompanyCheckNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CompanyPaidAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[CustomerCost] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[CustomerPaidAmount] [decimal](38,18)  NULL,
	[CustomerPaidDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CustomerCheckNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[EnteredBy] [int]  NULL,
	[UpdatedBy] [int]  NULL,
	[EnteredOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[UpdatedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ExpirationDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[InspectionSetDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[InspectionPassedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[InspectionNotes] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[BuildingDepartment] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[EngineerReceivedDate] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PinNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PermitPreparedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[PermitToCityDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[PermitReceivedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[FinalInspectionSetDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EngineerRequestedDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EngineerRequest] [int]  NULL,
	[WIPInspectionResult] [int]  NULL,
	[FieldManager] [int]  NULL,
	[FinalInspectionResult] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobPermitID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobPermitTypeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobPermitStatusID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_PermitAuthorityID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_AssignedToID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [JobPermitID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
